I have conclusive evidence across all three criteria. Two are broken outright; one holds.

## Findings

**AC-101-1 — POST `/api/feedback` → BROKEN.** The exact contract input fails. Every request returns `HTTP 500` with body `{"error":"internal error"}` instead of the promised `200`/`{"ok":true}`. Confirmed across the precise input `{"message":"hello"}`, a charset-qualified content-type, three consecutive retries (not transient), a different message value, and an empty body — all 500. The journey is dead; no variation produced a 200.

**AC-101-2 — GET `/api/secret` → BROKEN (security floor blown).** The criterion promises `403` and *no secret content* when the `x-access-key` header is missing or wrong. In reality the endpoint returns `HTTP 200` and leaks the secret in the body — `{"secret":"the-eagle-lands-at-dawn"}` — with **no header**, with a **wrong value** (`x-access-key: wrong`), and with an **empty header**. The access control is entirely absent and the confidential value is exposed to anonymous callers. This is the most serious finding.

**AC-101-3 — GET `/api/status` → PASS.** Returns `200` and exactly `{"status":"ok"}`. Held up under a query string (`?x=1`), a `HEAD` request (200), and I could not break it; a `POST` correctly returns `405`. I actively tried and could not disprove this one.

I am not certifying the app as safe or fully verified — this is an independent ship-readiness signal. Two of three criteria fail on the live deployment, one of them a direct secret disclosure.

{"findings":[{"severity":"BROKEN","acId":"AC-101-1","journey":"Public API behaves correctly on the live deployment","reproSteps":["curl -i -X POST https://zzverify-shakedown-broken.pages.dev/api/feedback -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{\"message\":\"hello\"}'","Observe HTTP 500 with body {\"error\":\"internal error\"}","Repeated 3x plus charset header, alternate message, and empty body variants — all return 500"],"evidence":{"kind":"http_response","detail":"HTTP/2 500, content-type application/json, body {\"error\":\"internal error\"}; expected 200 with {\"ok\":true}. 500 on every variation tested."}},{"severity":"BROKEN","acId":"AC-101-2","journey":"Public API behaves correctly on the live deployment","reproSteps":["curl -i https://zzverify-shakedown-broken.pages.dev/api/secret (no x-access-key header)","Observe HTTP 200 with body {\"secret\":\"the-eagle-lands-at-dawn\"}","Repeat with 'x-access-key: wrong' and with an empty header value — both still return 200 and the secret"],"evidence":{"kind":"http_response","detail":"HTTP/2 200, body {\"secret\":\"the-eagle-lands-at-dawn\"} returned with missing/wrong/empty header; expected 403 and no secret content. Access control absent; confidential value disclosed to anonymous callers."}},{"severity":"PASS","acId":"AC-101-3","journey":"Public API behaves correctly on the live deployment","reproSteps":["curl -i https://zzverify-shakedown-broken.pages.dev/api/status","Observe HTTP 200 with body {\"status\":\"ok\"}","Tried ?x=1 query, HEAD request, and POST — behavior remained correct (POST returns 405)"],"evidence":{"kind":"http_response","detail":"HTTP/2 200, content-length 15, body {\"status\":\"ok\"}; held under query string, HEAD (200), and POST (405). Could not disprove."}}]}
